violations.text: Employees were observed putting on gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Staff informed to wash hands. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and bathroom were lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
Staff placed dishes and utensils in the service area hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The handwashing sink in the service area is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

The door to the outside, located in the rear entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

Milk was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit in small low boy. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The door to the outside, located at the rear entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
The small low boy in the service area was observed in poor repair, with an ambient temperature of 49 degrees F. Unit was taken out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
A leak was observed at the hand washing sink in the kitchen. Cold water was not available at the hand washing sink in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
